demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence; no one else present

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My usual dull headache suddenly became a crushing pressure, and I suddenly cannot see anything out of the corners of my eyes — it's like looking through a tunnel.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The headache I've had for months got dramatically worse in the last day, and at the same time I've lost the outer edges of my vision in both eyes — I'm scared to move in case I fall.

symptom_narrative.onset: the headache has been there for about six months as a dull ache; in the last 24 hours it suddenly became far worse, and the vision loss came on rapidly today
symptom_narrative.duration: six months of headache; about a day of severe worsening and new vision loss
symptom_narrative.character: the old headache was a dull, constant pressure across the front and back of my head; now it's a crushing, intense pressure. The vision loss is like blinkers — I've lost the outer halves of what I can see in both eyes
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst headache I've ever had, and the vision loss is terrifying
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across the forehead and back of the head; vision loss is on the outer sides of both eyes
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the dull headache was there most days for months; today's severe headache and the vision loss are constant and came on suddenly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — my usual paracetamol did nothing for today's headache
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just came on and stayed
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been completely exhausted for a long time, I feel cold all the time even when it's warm, and my skin looks pale. Over the past year I've lost all interest in sex and can't get an erection.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had vision loss like this before; the dull headache has been building for months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in my chair, too frightened to walk because I keep bumping into things — I already tripped over the coffee table and bruised my shin

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing dull headaches for about six months
past_medical_history.how_managed: over-the-counter paracetamol, which used to take the edge off

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; no one else is with him during the call; unable to move around safely because of the sudden vision loss

objective_data_offered.value: skin looks pale; patient is holding his head and keeps turning his head from side to side to try to see
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-description over chat; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: bruise on the shin after tripping on a coffee table because of the vision loss
